jsonLd.title: Groww is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Groww in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Groww:
Groww is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Groww!
